title: Cravings: Foods and Drinks
description: This mod adds numerous foods and drinks to Minecraft!
body:
![cravings showcase!!!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff1e688e309c87a3284b5cfea40231f6beb171f2.png)
## Cravings Mod
Welcome to the Cravings mod, a mod that aims to add more foods and utilities to Minecraft! This project has been in the works for months, and is still in active development, so expect bugs. Join the discord server to preview the development of our mod!
